hero.subtitle: We simplify Egyptian law for you. We analyze documents, generate contracts, and answer your legal questions with high accuracy and speed.

features.subheader: Everything you need in one place

chat.title: Chat with Assistant
chat.description: Talk to the smart legal assistant and get instant answers for your legal questions

analysis.title: Document Analysis
analysis.description: Upload any legal document and get a simplified summary and instant answers

template.title: Contract Generation
template.description: Choose the contract type and fill in the required data to generate a professional contract

explanation.title: Terminology Explanation
explanation.description: Enter any complex legal term and get a clear explanation in simple language

legal-advice.title: Legal Consultations
legal-advice.description: Get specialized legal consultation in various fields from Egyptian law experts

case-tracking.title: Case Tracking
case-tracking.description: Track the status of your legal cases and get instant updates on session dates

pricing.subheader: Choose the plan that fits your legal needs

about.title: Why Moeen?
about.subtitle: Moeen is the first smart legal assistant specialized in Egyptian law. We use the latest AI technologies to provide accurate and fast legal consultations, saving you time, effort, and cost.

interactiveDemo.title: Designed specifically for your legal expertise
interactiveDemo.description: Offload complex tasks using natural language to your personal assistant specialized in Egyptian law. Moeen understands legal context and provides accurate, detailed answers.
interactiveDemo.typedText:
Contract Analysis:

• Duration: One year renewable
• Rent: 3000 EGP monthly
• Deposit: Two months in advance
• Maintenance responsibility: Owner

videoDemo.title: Designed for Professionals
videoDemo.subtitle: Smart AI-powered legal assistant for lawyers and businesses

footer.disclaimer: This service provides legal information and assistance, not formal legal advice. Please consult a licensed attorney for formal matters.

errors.createFailed: An unexpected error occurred while creating the chat. Please try again.
errors.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.
errors.createChatFailed: Failed to create a new chat
errors.processingError: Sorry, an error occurred while processing your request. Please try again.

ui.welcomeMessage: Start a new conversation with your smart legal assistant. I can help you analyze documents, draft contracts, and explain Egyptian legal terms.
ui.disclaimer: Moeen can make mistakes. Verify important information.
ui.deleteWarningTitle: Are you sure you want to delete this chat?

ban.title: Ban this user?
ban.description: {{name}} will lose access until an admin unbans the account.

unban.title: Unban this user?
unban.description: {{name}} will regain access to the platform.

delete.title: Delete this user?
delete.description: {{name}} will be removed from this admin list. This mock action cannot be undone.

notfound.subtitle: We apologize, but it seems this legal reference does not currently exist. Let's get you back on track.
